extraction.one_line_summary: WELLENS Wout attacked inside final kilometer from yellow jersey group to win stage while FUGLSANG Jakob took second place and race lead via time bonuses.
tactical_patterns: LUTSENKO/WOODS long-range raid forced ASTANA to defend with multiple riders, softening FUGLSANG's GC rivals before final climb attack.
FUGLSANG attacked 10km out on final climb in big gear maintaining tempo rather than explosive acceleration style.
BUCHMANN attack with 2km remaining caused decisive selection before FUGLSANG's move, MITCHELTON-SCOTT initially unconcerned but lost yellow.
WELLENS held wheels in GC group final kilometer then attacked inside 370m, taking stage while FUGLSANG secured GC via bonus seconds.

rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: rode entire final climb in big gear with grinding power style, gained yellow despite not winning stage
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: could grind back to attacks but lacked explosive pop, lost jersey by not covering FUGLSANG's initial move at 10km
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: spent entire stage in breakaway groups then continued helping FUGLSANG after being caught, exceptional domestique work
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: neutral: committed to long-range raid with LUTSENKO but appeared to have descent problem, rejoined but faded
rider_signals.WELLENS Wout: positive: timed final kilometer attack perfectly from GC group while others focused on time gaps, opportunistic stage hunting
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: attacked but immediately marked by YATES, sitting forward on saddle suggests difficulty on steepest sections
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: negative: tried accelerating at 1km but couldn't distance GC group, positioned at 1'13 down suggests climbing weakness
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: in early breakaway for KOM points but legs gone on penultimate climb, abandoned breakaway effort early
